items.claim: Alberto Montes is a better striker and grappler than McMillan.
items.quote: He's much better on the ground and I think he's better in the standup.

items.claim: McMillan's aggressive, windmilling striking style allows him to beat more technical opponents.
items.quote: McMillan can beat someone more technical than him just because he's windmilling his punches forward all the time

items.claim: Tabitha Richie has good grappling and judo skills.
items.quote: Richie's good on the ground. She has pretty good grappling, good judo.

items.claim: Tabitha Richie's striking is average and will look mediocre against Fatima Klein.
items.quote: Her striking though is not that great. is very average. Like it's going to look mediocre against Fatima Klein.

items.claim: Fatima Klein possesses incredible power and technical striking.
items.quote: She has incredible power, very good stand up, much more technical as well

items.claim: Chase Hooper is significantly better than Mitch Ramirez on the ground.
items.quote: Hooper is too good on the ground.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has a weak chin.
items.quote: Ramirez doesn't have the best chin.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez lacks good takedown defense.
items.quote: Ramirez also doesn't have good takedown defense.

items.claim: Jerry Kennaner is past his prime.
items.quote: Kaneir is definitely past his prime.

items.claim: Jerry Kennaner has the ability to maintain high-power output for five rounds.
items.quote: tries to knock you out with a big shot, and could throw his power punches for five straight rounds.

items.claim: Christian Lori Duncan has superior footwork and shot placement compared to Jerry Kennaner.
items.quote: I think also he's more skillful. He has better footwork. He's a taller, longer guy. He has great shot placement.

items.claim: Christian Lori Duncan is prone to getting lost in the sauce with spinning techniques.
items.quote: The only thing is sometimes he can get lost in the sauce. That's the only thing about him with all the spinning techniques
